details: The agent ran thorough kubectl commands against the cluster, correctly identified both required issues: (1) nodeSelector disk=ssd matches no node causing the pod to remain Pending/Unschedulable, and (2) the payments-config ConfigMap does not exist but is referenced via envFrom with Optional:false, which will cause CreateContainerConfigError once scheduling is fixed. Both findings are supported by actual command output (kubectl describe pod showed the FailedScheduling event and the envFrom reference; kubectl get configmap payments-config showed NotFound; kubectl get nodes --show-labels showed no disk=ssd label). The final answer explicitly names both issues and explains the masked/sequential nature of the second fault.
